arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news LIVE - Mathys Tel 'bid' amid £65m Nkunku call as summer plan 'accelerated' - football.london
arts.sum: "I was a Real Madrid supporter, but when I was young, our shirts always looked like Chelsea’s. Ricardo Pepi has revealed he was a Chelsea supporter growing up.

arts.ttl: Chelsea told why late Reece James equaliser against Bournemouth 'should not have stood'
arts.sum: Frustrated Cherries boss Andoni Iraola laments failure to rule out Blues captain’s last-gasp free-kick

arts.ttl: James makes timely Chelsea return after 'lonely' lay-off
arts.sum: Chelsea full-back reflects on a "lonely" injury lay-off after scoring a late leveller to announce his Premier League return.

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal and Chelsea star Willian attracting interest from Premier League clubs after terminating his contract with Olympiacos
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Former Arsenal and Chelsea winger Willian could be set for a sensational return to the Premier League . The 36-year-old's last stint in the English top flight came at Fulham .

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca happy for Reece James after fit-again captain scores late leveller
arts.sum: James made it 2-2 at the death.

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Bournemouth - TV channel and live stream details
arts.sum: Chelsea are seeking to end a run of four Premier League matches without a win as they host high-flying Bournemouth. Watch the Premier League on TNT Sports

arts.ttl: Trevoh Chalobah Chelsea transfer return stance revealed as key new clause has unexpected impact
arts.sum: His current boss, Oliver Glasner, claims that despite Chalobah being discussed as a possible recall option to solve Enzo Maresca's defensive problems, the player is keen to stay at Crystal Palace. Chalobah was recruited by Palace late on in the summer after being left out of Maresca's pre-season tour squad.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make goalkeeper January transfer decision as deal terminated
arts.sum: "Crawley Town Football Club can confirm that goalkeeper Eddie Beach has been recalled from his loan spell by his parent club Chelsea FC," a statement read. Chelsea have recalled Eddie Beach from his loan spell at League One side Crawley Town.

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed huge transfer boost as £22m January 'agreement' reached after double update
arts.sum: As for Nkunku, interest from Bayern Munich emerged after Chelsea made checks on the availability of Mathys Tel. The France international has struggled for regular minutes this season and is valued by Chelsea at more than £60million, as football.london understands. While the duo looked set to depart permanently if there was to be any movement, Chelsea are open to a loan spell for Chukwuemeka with Veiga only wanting a temporary move so he can play at centre-back, as per transfer guru Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Premier League release VAR statement during Chelsea vs Bournemouth after David Brooks incident
arts.sum: The Premier League were forced to release a VAR statement in the second half of Chelsea's clash against Bournemouth after an incident involving David Brooks. "VAR recommended an on-field review for a possible red card to Brooks for violent conduct," a statement read.
